title: ephemerantha eurorum
side_effects: Ephemerantha eurorum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing skin irritation, allergic reactions, or even respiratory problems in some individuals. Ingesting the plant's leaves or flowers can cause nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain due to its toxic compounds. Additionally, improper use of Ephemerantha eurorum can lead to interactions with medications, including blood thinners and diabetes medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions. In severe cases, improper handling or consumption of the plant can cause more serious health issues, including cardiac problems and seizures.
